entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A global staple food crop for nearly half of the world's population

entities.name: RICE BRAN
entities.description: An essential component of whole-grain rice with potential for enhancing human nutrition

entities.name: HUMAN NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth in humans

entities.name: SHELF LIFE
entities.description: The length of time for which a food product remains fit for consumption

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL FOOD PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The creation of foods that provide health benefits beyond basic nutrition

entities.name: BIOACTIVE COMPONENTS
entities.description: Components in rice bran that have biological activity

entities.name: STABILIZATION
entities.description: Approaches to extend shelf life and ensure availability of rice bran

entities.name: SOLVENT EXTRACTION
entities.description: A stabilization approach used for rice bran

entities.name: ENZYMATIC TREATMENTS
entities.description: A stabilization approach used for rice bran

entities.name: NUTRIENT AND PHYTOCHEMICAL PROFILES
entities.description: The composition of nutrients and phytochemicals in rice bran

entities.name: CULTIVAR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating new crop varieties to improve profiles

entities.name: FOOD-FORTIFICATION
entities.description: Strategies to improve the nutrient profiles of food

entities.name: POSTHARVEST AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Techniques applied after harvest to reduce waste and support growers

entities.name: PROCESSING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to process rice bran for consumption

entities.name: FOOD WASTE
entities.description: Unavoidable or avoidable loss of food

entities.name: PIGMENTED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Novel rice varieties with pigments that enhance nutritional value

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The overall state of physical and mental well-being of humans

relationships.description: RICE BRAN is a component of RICE
RICE BRAN has potential for enhancing HUMAN NUTRITION
STABILIZATION extends the SHELF LIFE of rice bran
STABILIZATION is used for FUNCTIONAL FOOD PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT

SOLVENT EXTRACTION is a type of STABILIZATION approach
ENZYMATIC TREATMENTS is a type of STABILIZATION approach

FOOD-FORTIFICATION can improve NUTRIENT AND PHYTOCHEMICAL PROFILES
